baseline_responses.instruction: If my opponent casts Brainstorm, how many times does my Orcish Bowmasters trigge
baseline_responses.response:
When Brainstorm is cast, it triggers 2 mana. 

If your Orcish Bowmasters is on the battlefield, it triggers 2 additional mana. 

So, in total, your Orcish Bowmasters triggers 4 mana.
